name: Suduli Kumar Balabantaray
title: Embedded Test Engineer
about: Experienced professional with 7+ years in Independent Verification & Validation for Critical Systems in the automotive domain. Specialized in Integration/Development Testing with a focus on automotive Electronic Stability Control System (ESC) ECU. Strong experience in testing with tools like CANoe, CANalyzer, CAPL, XIL-API, and TestStand. Proven track record in test automation, creating efficient test cases, and ensuring product quality and compliance with ISO standards.
objective: To work in a professional atmosphere that would give a scope to display my skills request for a challenging position. Where I can use my skills to grow me and my organization.
